title: Layer Output — Template
description: Replace title, description, and properties with this layer's actual output contract. Outputs are lock-once artifacts: revisions produce new files, never edits.

layer.description: Layer id that produced this artifact.

supersedes.description: artifact_id of the prior locked artifact this one replaces, or null if first.

body.description: Layer-specific payload. Replace with concrete schema in the per-layer copy.
